    Description
    private List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>
    ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.selectEffectiveSources(List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode> sourceNodes)
    Selects source nodes for a stream, preferring equipment producers over stream-unit producers.

    ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.addEndpoint(Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> endpoints, StreamInterface stream, ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode node)
    Adds a unit node as an endpoint for a stream, preserving insertion order and uniqueness.

    ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.addExplicitConnectionEdge(Set<String> edgeLines, ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode source, ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode target, ProcessConnection connection)
    Adds one explicit connection edge if both endpoints are present.
    private void
    ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.addStreamEdge(Set<String> edgeLines, ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode source, ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode sink, StreamInterface stream)
    Adds one stream-derived edge line if the endpoints are distinct.
    private void
    ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.collectStreamEndpoints(ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode node, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> producers, Map<StreamInterface,List<ProcessModelGraphvizExporter.UnitNode>> consumers)
    Collects stream producer and consumer endpoints for one unit node.
